text: I joined a gym last month
I joined a gym last month Haven't gone yet , but I feel really good about the decision
feel really good about the decision People ask " How's the gym going ? "
How's the gym going I say " Great ! I'm already in the best shape of my life . . . for someone who never goes ! "
for someone who never goes My trainer keeps calling
My trainer keeps calling I think he's starting to take it personally
